description: The clothes hanger might be something you do not think about too much until you pull a garment off to wear and there is an odd crease. There is a wide range of hangers to choose from that often serve different purposes. If you are anything like me, you will also prefer uniformity in your wardrobe. I have mainly wooden hangers for that reason. However, sometimes a garment calls for something unique. Here I give you the rundown on which hangers suit, which garments and what to avoid.
